name: Adventure Time| RPG+18
description:
Marceline Update!!!

Hey guys, I've just added Marceline's character with better descriptions and her whole story.

Update Changes:

-Marceline's Story

-More generic message for future updates

-Bot name

v0.2.3 Update!!

Update Changes:

-Reduced Ultimate Tokens.

-Expanded Scenario Tokens.

-Improved "status" system for {{user}}.

Princess Bubblegum Update!! (v0.3)

-Bonnibel Added

-Bonnibel's Story

-Improved Greeting

-Experience Item added to {{user}} interface

-Balanced Experience system based on defeating or killing Monsters.

v0.3.2 Uptadte

-Time and day item added

-Greeting changed to make {{user}}'s experience and path as liberal as possible

-Experience system improved

v0.4 Update

Classes Update:

-Added classes

★Warrior

★Ninja

★Mage

-More depth to Fionna and Cake's character.

-Decreased Ultimate Tokens.

-New Main Greeting.

-Valid for a Prism Wish in the Inventory.

Images Update!

This is still in beta... so don't expect much, this is just me experimenting a bit with the images feature. There are only a few locations with images for now. Don't be upset if it doesn't work as I'm inexperienced at this and would really appreciate some advice.

I have a Ko-Fi account if you'd like to donate or request a custom bot:

https://ko-fi.com/sekithemc

You can purchase the description of this bot to have it as a private bot:

https://www.patreon.com/posts/adventure-time-134640980?utm_medium=clipboard_copy&utm_source=copyLink&utm_campaign=postshare_creator&utm_content=join_link
creator: SekiTheMC
